questionHtml:
Calculate, showing your working, the percentage change in mean cholesterol level after one week on the study diet.

 

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .%
markschemeHtml:
((165–150) ÷ 150) × 100;

(=) 10 (%);

Allow up to 167 = 11.3 %

1 mark for correct working if above 167.
